ORDER OF STATUS HEARING

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-09-2022 Continued To Sep-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Vanessa Echazarreta and Attorney Kristy A. Hernandez to appear on Sep-06-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the final inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
